input.content:
from __future__ import annotations

import math
from dataclasses import dataclass

from myraytracer.ray import Ray
from myraytracer.vec import Vec3


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class Camera:
    origin: Vec3
    look_at: Vec3
    up: Vec3
    vfov_degrees: float
    aspect_ratio: float

    def ray_for_pixel(self, px: float, py: float, width: int, height: int) -> Ray:
        forward = (self.look_at - self.origin).normalized()
        right = forward.cross(self.up).normalized()
        true_up = right.cross(forward)

        half_height = math.tan(math.radians(self.vfov_degrees) / 2)
        half_width = half_height * self.aspect_ratio

        x_ndc = (px / width) * 2 - 1
        y_ndc = 1 - (py / height) * 2

        direction = forward + right * (x_ndc * half_width) + true_up * (y_ndc * half_height)
        return Ray(origin=self.origin, direction=direction.normalized())

from __future__ import annotations

import math
from dataclasses import dataclass

from myraytracer.ray import Ray
from myraytracer.vec import Vec3


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class Camera:
    origin: Vec3
    look_at: Vec3
    up: Vec3
    vfov_degrees: float
    aspect_ratio: float

    def ray_for_pixel(self, px: float, py: float, width: int, height: int) -> Ray:
        forward = (self.look_at - self.origin).normalized()
        right = forward.cross(self.up).normalized()
        true_up = right.cross(forward)

        half_height = math.tan(math.radians(self.vfov_degrees) / 2)
        half_width = half_height * self.aspect_ratio

        x_ndc = (px / width) * 2 - 1
        y_ndc = 1 - (py / height) * 2

        direction = forward + right * (x_ndc * half_width) + true_up * (y_ndc * half_height)
        return Ray(origin=self.origin, direction=direction.normalized())

input.content:
from __future__ import annotations

import pytest

from myraytracer.camera import Camera
from myraytracer.vec import Vec3


def make_camera(aspect_ratio: float = 2.0) -> Camera:
    return Camera(
        origin=Vec3(0, 0, 0),
        look_at=Vec3(0, 0, -1),
        up=Vec3(0, 1, 0),
        vfov_degrees=90.0,
        aspect_ratio=aspect_ratio,
    )


def test_center_pixel_points_down_negative_z() -> None:
    camera = make_camera()
    ray = camera.ray_for_pixel(px=100, py=50, width=200, height=100)
    assert ray.origin == Vec3(0, 0, 0)
    assert ray.direction.x == pytest.approx(0.0, abs=1e-12)
    assert ray.direction.y == pytest.approx(0.0, abs=1e-12)
    assert ray.direction.z == pytest.approx(-1.0)


def test_off_center_pixel_matches_hand_computed_direction() -> None:
    camera = make_camera()
    ray = camera.ray_for_pixel(px=200, py=50, width=200, height=100)
    assert ray.direction.x == pytest.approx(0.8944271909999159)
    assert ray.direction.y == pytest.approx(0.0, abs=1e-12)
    assert ray.direction.z == pytest.approx(-0.4472135954999579)
    assert ray.direction.length() == pytest.approx(1.0)


def test_degenerate_single_pixel_image_does_not_crash() -> None:
    camera = make_camera(aspect_ratio=1.0)
    ray = camera.ray_for_pixel(px=0, py=0, width=1, height=1)
    assert ray.direction.length() == pytest.approx(1.0)

from __future__ import annotations

import pytest

from myraytracer.camera import Camera
from myraytracer.vec import Vec3


def make_camera(aspect_ratio: float = 2.0) -> Camera:
    return Camera(
        origin=Vec3(0, 0, 0),
        look_at=Vec3(0, 0, -1),
        up=Vec3(0, 1, 0),
        vfov_degrees=90.0,
        aspect_ratio=aspect_ratio,
    )


def test_center_pixel_points_down_negative_z() -> None:
    camera = make_camera()
    ray = camera.ray_for_pixel(px=100, py=50, width=200, height=100)
    assert ray.origin == Vec3(0, 0, 0)
    assert ray.direction.x == pytest.approx(0.0, abs=1e-12)
    assert ray.direction.y == pytest.approx(0.0, abs=1e-12)
    assert ray.direction.z == pytest.approx(-1.0)


def test_off_center_pixel_matches_hand_computed_direction() -> None:
    camera = make_camera()
    ray = camera.ray_for_pixel(px=200, py=50, width=200, height=100)
    assert ray.direction.x == pytest.approx(0.8944271909999159)
    assert ray.direction.y == pytest.approx(0.0, abs=1e-12)
    assert ray.direction.z == pytest.approx(-0.4472135954999579)
    assert ray.direction.length() == pytest.approx(1.0)


def test_degenerate_single_pixel_image_does_not_crash() -> None:
    camera = make_camera(aspect_ratio=1.0)
    ray = camera.ray_for_pixel(px=0, py=0, width=1, height=1)
    assert ray.direction.length() == pytest.approx(1.0)

1	[build-system]
2	requires = ["hatchling"]
3	build-backend = "hatchling.build"
4	
5	[project]
6	name = "my-raytracer"
7	version = "0.0.1"
8	description = "Monte Carlo path tracer (spheres/planes, Lambertian, deterministic)"
9	authors = [{ name = "Lorenzo Liuzzo", email = "lorenzoliuzzo@outlook.com" }]
10	readme = "README.md"
11	license = { text = "MIT" }
12	requires-python = ">=3.11"
13	dependencies = ["numpy>=1.26"]
14	
15	[project.optional-dependencies]
16	dev = ["pytest>=8", "pytest-cov>=5", "ruff>=0.6", "pre-commit>=3"]
17	
18	[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
19	packages = ["src/myraytracer"]
20	
21	[tool.ruff]
22	line-length = 100
23	src = ["src", "tests"]
24	
25	[tool.ruff.lint]
26	select = ["E", "F", "I", "UP", "B"]
27	
28	[tool.pytest.ini_options]
29	testpaths = ["tests"]
30	addopts = "-q"
31	markers = ["slow: integration/slow tests, excluded from the fast local loop"]

file.content:
[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[project]
name = "my-raytracer"
version = "0.0.1"
description = "Monte Carlo path tracer (spheres/planes, Lambertian, deterministic)"
authors = [{ name = "Lorenzo Liuzzo", email = "lorenzoliuzzo@outlook.com" }]
readme = "README.md"
license = { text = "MIT" }
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = ["numpy>=1.26"]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = ["pytest>=8", "pytest-cov>=5", "ruff>=0.6", "pre-commit>=3"]

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["src/myraytracer"]

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
src = ["src", "tests"]

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E", "F", "I", "UP", "B"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
addopts = "-q"
markers = ["slow: integration/slow tests, excluded from the fast local loop"]
